authorized_by: PI (autonomy + authority grant, relayed 2026-07-12): 'tenemos autonomia y autoridad; necesitamos resultados para que el pueda dar una aprobacion'
replaces: the Garrido pre-build sign-off gate, per the DRA-2 autonomy precedent: substitute PI-autonomy + honest disclosure, run the pre-RL screen, and bring Garrido RESULTS to approve on data rather than on a template.

disclosed_researcher_choices_pending_lat.convoy_ontology: Option A (convoy IS the scarce downstream transport) -- adopted because 5000/48h=2500/day matches thesis 2400-2600/day and the overlay is non-binding; labeled a stylized extension, NOT a validated reproduction
disclosed_researcher_choices_pending_lat.convoy_equivalent: aggregate two-day convoy-equivalent, not a historical single vehicle
disclosed_researcher_choices_pending_lat.dead_shift_dimension: S1 fixed; dynamic S2 excluded because transport binds at 2500/day

scope_authorized_now: G1 mechanism-ladder oracle on the central cell (H_PI, H_obs) -- pre-RL, no learner, no virgin tapes
scope_still_blocked: PPO / any learner (G5) until the pre-RL gate passes in >=2 adjacent cells
honesty_conditions: every outcome (headroom or STOP) is reported; no cell is selected by max ReT
results are brought to Garrido; if he rejects the convoy ontology or ranges, the affected result is reclassified, not defended
the already-supported manuscript is not blocked by Program G
paper_language_binding: a stylized two-CSSU shared-transport spatial-commitment extension of the thesis-grounded MFSC; results are conditional on this disclosed contract
